UpdateBlb.blbId: ID of the LoadBalancer to be updated.
UpdateBlb.name: Name of the LoadBalancer for easy identification. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -\_/. characters. Auto-generated if not provided.
UpdateBlb.desc: Description of the LoadBalancer instance for additional details. Length 0–450 bytes, supports Chinese characters. Defaults to empty.
UpdateBlb.allowDelete: Whether deletion is allowed. Defaults to true, meaning deletion is permitted.
UpdateBlb.allocateIpv6: Whether to allocate an IPv6 address. true means allocate, false means do not allocate.
